report.summary: Built two SEO-optimized learn guides covering Bitcoin's 20M supply milestone and Tokenomics 2.0 / DeFi protocol revenue, plus an interactive BitcoinSupplyTracker component — all added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Bitcoin 20 Millionth Coin mined on March 9, 2026 — Era of Scarcity begins, ~1M BTC remaining over 114 years, Fidelity + Kraken reactions, strong news SEO momentum
Topic 2: Tokenomics 2.0 — Uniswap UNIfication ($591M burn + fee switch), Aave AAVEnomics 2.0 (buyback model), Hyperliquid ($74M revenue in one month), DeFi fee total $600M/month
Gap analysis confirmed: no existing degen0x guides on Bitcoin supply mechanics or DeFi fee-switch tokenomics
Existing tools confirmed: /tools/protocol-revenue already live — new tokenomics guide links directly to it

sections.title: Content Created
items: /learn/bitcoin-20-million-supply-milestone — ~2,800 words, Beginner level, covers: milestone stats, halving schedule table, lost coins, hard money comparison table (BTC vs Gold vs Fiat), scarcity/price relationship, 5-question FAQ

/learn/tokenomics-protocol-revenue-guide — ~3,200 words, Intermediate level, covers: Tokenomics 1.0 vs 2.0 comparison, fee switch mechanics, buyback/burn/revenue-sharing models, Uniswap UNIfication deep-dive, Aave + Hyperliquid profiles, protocol P/E ratio table, evaluation framework, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Bitcoin guide title: 'Bitcoin 20 Million Coins Mined: Era of Scarcity 2026 | degen0x' (57 chars)
Tokenomics guide title: 'Tokenomics 2.0: DeFi Protocol Revenue & Fee Switches 2026 | degen0x' (67 chars)
Both pages: ArticleStructuredData + FAQStructuredData + BreadcrumbStructuredData JSON-LD schemas
Both pages: OpenGraph (type: article, publishedTime, image) + Twitter card metadata
Bitcoin guide targets: 'bitcoin 20 million mined', 'how many bitcoin left', 'bitcoin supply 2026', 'bitcoin scarcity era'
Tokenomics guide targets: 'tokenomics 2.0', 'DeFi fee switch', 'protocol revenue crypto', 'Uniswap fee switch 2026'
Internal links: both guides cross-link each other + DCA calculator + protocol-revenue tool + restaking/RWA guides

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: BitcoinSupplyTracker.tsx — client component, pure math (no API), calculates circulating supply from block height estimation, shows: mined BTC, remaining BTC, % issued, current block reward, days to next halving, halving countdown
Embedded in bitcoin-20-million-supply-milestone/page.tsx above Table of Contents
Updates every 30 seconds via setInterval, animates supply progress bar

sections.title: PUBLISH_QUEUE Updates
items: TypeScript check: 0 errors on new files (pre-existing error in structured-data.examples.ts unrelated)
